jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at 99acres
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? 99acres in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About 99acres:
99acres is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 99acres!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
